MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Zergie Brokov.
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kevin Kinnel , is present.
Attorney, Ted Janowsky , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of OCT-12-2010 remains on calendar.
